biography.title: Experience and Trust
biography.p1: Since 2009, I have been actively involved in Forex markets. Over the years, I have accumulated in-depth knowledge in technical analysis, fundamental analysis, and market psychology.
biography.p2: Since 2021, I have been working as an official Introducing Broker (IB) and affiliate partner with HFM (HF Markets). In this capacity, I provide support in HFM account opening processes, platform information, and market analysis content.
biography.p3: The content and analysis provided do not constitute investment advice, portfolio management, or individual investment consultation. It is for informational purposes only.
